title: Techguns Reborn
description: Modern Techguns unofficial port for Minecraft
body:
![Techguns Reborn Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dffc352975d7dc9f6249078c05ea3e293fd54af.png)
# Features
- 	Adds a variety of firearms:
- 	Pistols, rifles, shotguns, heavy weapons
- 	Different damage types and behaviors
- 	Adds technology progression:
- 	Machines for processing materials
- 	Crafting components and ammunition
- 	Adds new enemies and structures:
- 	Armed NPCs
- 	Generated locations with loot and danger
- 	Adds armor and equipment:
- 	Protective gear with different stats
- 	Utility items that affect gameplay

# Gameplay

Techguns Reborn is not vanilla-style combat.
- 	Enemies can use guns
- 	Combat is more dangerous
- 	Progression requires resource management and crafting

# Development Status

**This is an active porting project.**

Some features from the original Techguns may:
- 	be missing
- 	be reworked
- 	not function exactly the same

# Notes
- 	This is a port of the original Techguns mod
- 	Not all content is implemented yet
- 	Bugs may occur during development
